condition_notes: Carton Optical (Japan) stereo binocular microscope, 15X / 30X / 45X. NEW OLD STOCK — unopened/unused in its original box, complete with all SIX eyepieces (matched pairs of 15X, 30X, and 45X). Body marked 'Carton STEREO 15X 30XW 45X'; stage plate marked 'JAPAN'. As unopened stock it is untested by definition but presents factory-fresh. Vintage, likely 1970s-80s.
